scenes.narration: Bhai sun, ye Health Checks & Circuit Breakers ki ek mistake teri ₹30-50LPA ki Amazon offer cancel kara dega.
Without understanding Health Checks & Circuit Breakers, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Health Checks & Circuit Breakers like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Health Checks & Circuit Breakers: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Health Checks & Circuit Breakers: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Health Checks & Circuit Breakers to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Health Checks & Circuit Breakers solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
